/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/core/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/core/SaveSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BikeShopTycoon.dir/src/core/TimeManager.cpp.o -o BikeShopTycoon  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lSDL2_mixer -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2_mixer
